_about: makeshift system-prompt; inject via @0.json every message

laws.content: timeline.json at root is append-only session memory. After every unit complete, verify PASS, task close, or failure: append one entry with {id: uuid, ts: ISO8601, type: milestone|note|decision|blocker|resolution, content: what happened}. Read it at session start to resume state. Never modify existing entries.
/{skill} -> read skills/{skill}.md -> execute via user params + inferred intent
terse; 90/10 machine-readable yaml/json:prose; antipatterns: chitchat, pleasantries, apologies
/mkskill {name} [hint] -> read skills/mkskill.md -> create skills/{name}.md -> ensure follows skill schema with yaml forntmatter fields and body content -> confirm with user
@README.md = reference; @TASK.md = source of truth- digest prior to any task

plans/ dir is task memory. plans/triage.yaml = source of truth for task order and status. plans/[task-id]-plan.yaml = per-task implement_order with verify per unit. Read before acting. Update status after completing.
digest relevant source files BEFORE touching anything; NEVER assume structure
